'''fabodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scabicide|scabicide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scabicide|scabicide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fabodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæbedeth|fæbedeth]] || [[word:fæbedej|fæbedej]] || [[word:fæbedesh|fæbedesh]] || [[word:fæbede|fæbede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabobodoth|fabobodoth]] || [[word:fabobodoj|fabobodoj]] || [[word:fabobodosh|fabobodosh]] || [[word:fabobodo|fabobodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabodoth|fabodoth]] || [[word:fabodoj|fabodoj]] || [[word:fabodosh|fabodosh]] || [[word:fabodo|fabodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabofdoth|fabofdoth]] || [[word:fabofdoj|fabofdoj]] || [[word:fabofdosh|fabofdosh]] || [[word:fabofdof|fabofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fabodotho|fabodotho]] || [[word:fabodojo|fabodojo]] || [[word:fabodosho|fabodosho]] || [[word:fabodoko|fabodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fabodoth|fabodoth]] || [[word:fabodoj|fabodoj]] || [[word:fabodosh|fabodosh]] || [[word:fabodo|fabodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fabodothol|fabodothol]] || [[word:fabodojol|fabodojol]] || [[word:fabodoshol|fabodoshol]] || [[word:fabodokol|fabodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fabodothotho|fabodothotho]] || [[word:fabodojojo|fabodojojo]] || [[word:fabodoshosho|fabodoshosho]] || [[word:fabodoko|fabodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fabodothon|fabodothon]] || [[word:fabodojon|fabodojon]] || [[word:fabodoshon|fabodoshon]] || [[word:fabodokon|fabodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fabodothoro|fabodothoro]] || [[word:fabodojoro|fabodojoro]] || [[word:fabodoshoro|fabodoshoro]] || [[word:fabodokoro|fabodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
